sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39803" key="e)pikoi/tios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικοίτ-ιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n39803.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">at bedtime</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾆσμα</foreign> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐ.</foreign>, of self-examination, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:19p.460M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19p.460M.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
